message:
fix: add routing transaction for ephemeral store (bd-3wi7r5)

The original ephemeral store routed at the DoltStore method level but
missed the transaction path. cloneSubgraph uses RunInTransaction, and
doltTransaction methods wrote directly to Dolt, bypassing SQLite.

Add routingTransaction that lazily determines target store based on
first CreateIssue Ephemeral flag. Also exports BeginTx on ephemeral
store and fixes SearchIssues default limit inconsistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
